source_pr.title: types, stmtctx, *: use ZeroDate, ZeroInDate and InvalidDate related flags to replace variable in statement context
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #47508, close #47507

Problem Summary:

This PR replaces the field `NoZeroDate`, `IgnoreZeroInDate` and `AllowInvalidDate` to the flag in types context.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [x] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No need to test
  > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->  

They are all covered by existing tests

symptoms: // explicitTz is used to handle a data race of timeZone, refer to https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/40710. It only works for timestamp now, be careful to use it!
failure_signature: // explicitTz is used to handle a data race of timeZone, refer to https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/40710. It only works for timestamp now, be careful to use it!
